Permanent Account Number (PAN) facilitate Income Tax Department linking of various documents, including payment of taxes, assessment, tax
demand tax arrears, matching ofinformation and easy maintenance & retrievalofelectronic information etc. relating to a taxpayer.
Quoting ofPAN is now mandatory for several transactions specified under Income Tax Act, 1961 (Refer Rule l14B ofIncome Tax Rules, 1962)
Possessing or using more than one PAN is against the law & may attract penalty ofupto Rs. 10,000.
The PAN Card enclosed contains Enhanced QR Code which is readable by a specific Android Mobile App. Keyword to search this specific Mobile
App on Google Play Store is "Enhanced QR Code Reader for PAN Card.
"Enhanced QR Code Reader for PAN Card" àI
